title: Income Tax (China-Africa Development Fund) (Approval and Exemption) Order, 2011

sections.heading: With respect to the Agreement described in the Schedule, Approval of
sections.text:
foreign
China-Africa Development Fund is hereby approved for the purpose
organisation
of exemption from tax.

sections.heading: The income of the organisation approved in paragraph 2 shall Exemption
sections.text:
be exempt from tax pursuant to subparagraph (5) of paragraph 5 from tax
